{# Version switcher rendered from docs/build/html/versions.json via html_context. #} {%- if docs_versions and docs_versions|length > 1 %}
{{ docs_current_version }}
Versions
    {%- for item in docs_versions %} {%- if item.name == docs_current_version %}
  • {{ item.name }}
    • {%- else %}
  • {{ item.name }}
    • {%- endif %} {%- endfor %}
{%- endif %}
